contract.summary: 导航 Waypoint 显式传送与交通边来源

joins: waypointnode Start/End 补齐节点名称、SafeLocID、类型和条件
waypointsafelocs 补齐 DB 坐标与 MapID
uimapassignment 仅把 SafeLoc 坐标定位到 UiMap；不生成地图邻接边
where: 只导出 waypointedge.Start -> waypointedge.End 明确边
不使用 TaxiPath 飞行管理员路线，不使用手写 id
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 DB Waypoint 显式边

nodes.sql: WITH located_nodes AS (SELECT CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_node_id, node.Name_lang AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(node.SafeLocID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS safe_loc_id, CAST(COALESCE(node.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(node.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_flags, CAST(COALESCE(node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_type, CAST(COALESCE(node.WaypointMapVolumeID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_map_volume_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS world_z FROM waypointnode node LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs loc ON CAST(loc.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(node.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) > 0), ui_located_nodes AS (SELECT ln.*, CAST(COALESCE((SELECT CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER) FROM uimapassignment uma WHERE CAST(uma.MapID AS INTEGER) = ln.map_id AND ln.world_x BETWEEN CASE WHEN CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL) < CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL) THEN CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL) ELSE CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL) END AND CASE WHEN CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL) > CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL) THEN CAST(uma.Region_0 AS REAL) ELSE CAST(uma.Region_3 AS REAL) END AND ln.world_y BETWEEN CASE WHEN CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL) < CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL) THEN CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL) ELSE CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL) END AND CASE WHEN CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL) > CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL) THEN CAST(uma.Region_1 AS REAL) ELSE CAST(uma.Region_4 AS REAL) END ORDER BY CAST(COALESCE(uma.OrderIndex, 0) AS INTEGER), CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER), CAST(uma.ID AS INTEGER) LIMIT 1), 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_id FROM located_nodes ln) SELECT 'waypoint_' || CAST(waypoint_node_id AS TEXT) AS node_key, waypoint_node_id, node_name, safe_loc_id, player_condition_id, node_flags, node_type, waypoint_map_volume_id, map_id, ui_map_id, world_x, world_y, world_z FROM ui_located_nodes ORDER BY waypoint_node_id

joins: uimapassignment 用 SafeLoc 坐标定位 UiMap
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 Waypoint 节点

edges.sql: SELECT CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_edge_id, 'waypoint_' || CAST(edge.Start AS TEXT) AS from_node_key, CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) AS from_waypoint_node_id, start_node.Name_lang AS from_name, CAST(COALESCE(start_node.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(start_node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_node_type, CAST(COALESCE(start_loc.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS from_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(start_loc.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS from_world_x, CAST(COALESCE(start_loc.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS from_world_y, 'waypoint_' || CAST(edge.End AS TEXT) AS to_node_key, CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) AS to_waypoint_node_id, end_node.Name_lang AS to_name, CAST(COALESCE(end_node.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS to_player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(end_node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS to_node_type, CAST(COALESCE(end_loc.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS to_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(end_loc.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS to_world_x, CAST(COALESCE(end_loc.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS to_world_y, CAST(COALESCE(edge.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS flags, CAST(COALESCE(edge.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(edge.Field_8_1_5_29281_005, 1) AS INTEGER) AS cost FROM waypointedge edge LEFT JOIN waypointnode start_node ON CAST(start_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointnode end_node ON CAST(end_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs start_loc ON CAST(start_loc.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(start_node.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs end_loc ON CAST(end_loc.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(end_node.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 Waypoint 显式边

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationWaypointEdges = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, nodes, edges }

change_log.summary: 初始契约版本，导出 waypointedge.Start -> End 显式边和节点 SafeLoc 定位
